acceptance_criteria.evidence: Route and briefing kill lines now use the Unicode arrow character instead of raw '<-' in Telegram HTML replies.
finalizeThreadMessage appends <b>/<code> helper blocks for HTML messages instead of Markdown.
Targeted tests and full npm run check succeeded.
